backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Snake game backend, defining types and state for multiplayer rooms, player profiles, game state, and coin drops, with shared functions for room management, user profiles, and snake death coin logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three confirmed features: fixing the coin counter bug, moving the minimap to the top-left, and repositioning the joystick upward in SpaceSnakeScreen.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each module's role in the match-3 game and snake game frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design token CSS variables for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Snake Game 3D PWA, setting up viewport meta tags, PWA manifest link, Apple web app tags, and mounting the React app root.
frontend/PLAY_STORE_TWA_GUIDE.md: Step-by-step guide for packaging the Snake Game PWA as an Android App Bundle using Bubblewrap/TWA and submitting it to the Google Play Store.
frontend/public/.well-known/assetlinks.j: Android Digital Asset Links file associating the web domain with the Snake Game Android app package for TWA URL delegation.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA web manifest for Snake Game 3D specifying fullscreen landscape display, theme colors, and icon references for 192px, 512px, and maskable variants.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker that caches key game assets on install, cleans old caches on activate, and serves cached responses with network fallback for offline support.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps SpaceSnakeScreen in a full-viewport dark-themed div with ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/game/animations.ts: Exports animation timing constants (swap, clear, fall, etc.) and a simple promise-based wait utility.
frontend/src/game/assets.ts: Maps static asset paths for candy sprites, background, and UI elements, and provides a helper to compute sprite sheet positions by candy type.
frontend/src/game/audio/audioManager.ts: Implements a singleton AudioManager class that loads, plays, and mutes HTML audio elements, pre-loaded with silent placeholder sounds for swap, match, special, levelComplete, and gameOver.
frontend/src/game/audio/sfx.ts: Provides named helper functions (playSwapSound, playMatchSound, etc.) that delegate to the audioManager singleton with preset volume levels.
frontend/src/game/boardGeneration.ts: Generates the initial match-3 board without pre-existing matches and provides a refill function to fill empty cells with new random candies.
frontend/src/game/boardReshuffle.ts: Reshuffles the board by regenerating it until a configuration with at least one legal move is found (up to 10 attempts).
frontend/src/game/CandyTile.tsx: React component rendering a single candy tile with sprite-sheet background positioning for regular and special candy types, applying CSS classes for selection, highlight, clearing, and falling states.
frontend/src/game/GameBoard.tsx: 8×8 game board React component that renders CandyTile grid cells and handles mouse click, hover, and touch swipe/tap interactions to trigger cell selection and swap attempts.
frontend/src/game/GameScreen.tsx: Main game screen component that renders the header, HUD (level/score/moves), game board, instructions, overlays, and footer, wiring up game state and audio mute controls.
frontend/src/game/gravity.ts: Applies gravity to the board by sliding candies downward within each column and returns the updated board along with fall animation metadata.
frontend/src/game/interaction.ts: Provides utility functions for board interaction: checking adjacency, validating positions, and computing neighboring positions by direction.
frontend/src/game/legalMoves.ts: Scans the board to determine whether any adjacent swap would produce a match, returning a boolean indicating if legal moves exist.
frontend/src/game/matchDetection.ts: Finds all horizontal and vertical matches of 3+ same-type candies on the board, and provides a helper to check if a proposed swap would create a match.
frontend/src/game/Overlays.tsx: Defines two overlay components: GameOverOverlay (shows final score and restart button) and LevelCompleteOverlay (shows level completion and next level button).
frontend/src/game/progression.ts: Computes level configuration (target score and move count) and checks whether the current score meets the level completion threshold.
frontend/src/game/resolutionPipeline.ts: Orchestrates match resolution by finding matches, creating special candies, clearing positions, calculating scores, and checking for special candy activations.
frontend/src/game/scoring.ts: Calculates scores for cleared candies (with a special multiplier), target scores per level, and initial move counts per level.
frontend/src/game/specialActivations.ts: Determines the set of board positions cleared by each special candy type (striped-h/v, wrapped, color-bomb) and detects striped+striped combo activations.
frontend/src/game/specialCandyRules.ts: Determines what special candy (color-bomb, striped) to create from a match based on its length and orientation, and applies that special candy to the board while clearing other matched positions.
frontend/src/game/touchControls.ts: Detects swipe direction (up/down/left/right) from touch start/end coordinates using a minimum distance threshold.
frontend/src/game/types.ts: Defines core TypeScript types and constants for the match-3 game, including Candy, Position, Match, AnimationState, and GameState interfaces.
frontend/src/game/useMatch3Game.ts: React hook that manages the full match-3 game state, including board initialization, swap handling, cascade resolution with animations, scoring, level progression, and sound effects.
frontend/src/hillclimb/assets.ts: Exports a centralized ASSETS object mapping asset names to their generated image file paths for the Hill Climb game.
frontend/src/hillclimb/daily/dailyChalle: Generates a deterministic daily challenge (distance, airtime, or coins) based on the current date and provides helpers to check if it has been completed or claimed.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/failures.t: Checks vehicle failure conditions—whether the vehicle is flipped upside-down (tracking flip duration) or has crashed due to high-speed impact.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/fuel.ts: Manages the vehicle fuel system, providing creation, continuous depletion over time, and refueling functions.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/hazards.ts: Manages procedural hazard spawning ahead of the vehicle, cleanup of old hazards, and collision detection between hazards and the vehicle.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/input.ts: Defines the InputState interface for throttle and brake values and provides a factory function returning a zeroed input state.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/physics.ts: Provides 2D vector math utilities (add, subtract, scale, normalize, dot product, integration) used throughout the physics engine.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/pickups.ts: Handles procedural spawning of fuel and coin pickups along the terrain ahead of the vehicle, cleanup of old pickups, and collision-based collection that updates fuel and coin scoring.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/renderer.t: Renders each game frame to a canvas, including sky, terrain with gradient/texture, pickup icons, hazard rocks, and the vehicle, using a camera that follows the vehicle.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/scoring.ts: Tracks and updates the player's distance, coin count, and stunt points each physics step based on vehicle velocity and airtime.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/stunts.ts: Detects airborne stunt state by checking wheel grounding, accumulating air time, and resetting stunt data on landing.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/terrain.ts: Defines terrain data structures and generates procedural terrain height via multi-octave sine-based noise, plus a surface normal sampler.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/useFixedTi: React hook that runs a fixed-timestep game loop using requestAnimationFrame and an accumulator to call the provided step function at a consistent rate.
frontend/src/hillclimb/engine/vehicle.ts: Defines vehicle state and stats, and implements physics update logic including gravity, wheel ground contact, suspension forces, throttle/brake, and terrain alignment.
frontend/src/hillclimb/HillClimbApp.tsx: Root component for the Hill Climb game that manages screen navigation (menu, garage, gameplay, results, etc.) and persists game state including coins, unlocked vehicles, upgrades, and daily claims.
frontend/src/hillclimb/progression/stora: Loads and saves persistent game state (coins, unlocked vehicles/photos, upgrade levels, daily claim history) to localStorage with migration support.
frontend/src/hillclimb/progression/upgra: Defines upgrade configurations for engine, suspension, tires, and fuel tank, and provides helpers to compute costs, check affordability, and apply upgrade stat modifiers.
frontend/src/hillclimb/progression/vehic: Declares the three available vehicle configs (Hill Climber, Dirt Bike, Monster Truck) with their base stats and unlock costs, plus a lookup helper.
frontend/src/hillclimb/screens/DailyChal: Displays today's daily challenge title, description, and coin reward, and lets the player claim the reward if the challenge is completed and not yet claimed.
frontend/src/hillclimb/screens/GameplayS: Main gameplay screen that initializes all game systems (vehicle, terrain, fuel, pickups, hazards, scoring), runs the fixed-timestep loop, renders to a canvas, and shows the HUD and drive controls.
frontend/src/hillclimb/screens/GarageScr: Renders the Garage screen with tabs for browsing/selecting vehicles and purchasing upgrades, using the current game state to show unlock status and coin balance.
frontend/src/hillclimb/screens/MainMenuS: Displays the main menu with buttons to start a run, open the garage, view the daily challenge, and open the photo gallery.
frontend/src/hillclimb/screens/PhotoGall: Shows a grid of gallery photos that can be unlocked with coins, with dialogs for viewing unlocked photos and confirming purchases.
frontend/src/hillclimb/screens/ResultsSc: Displays end-of-run statistics including distance, coins earned, stunt points, and total coins, with options to play again or return to the menu.
frontend/src/hillclimb/screens/StageSele: Renders a grid of selectable race stages, each showing a preview image, name, and description with a 'Race Here' button.
frontend/src/hillclimb/stages/stages.ts: Defines the three game stages (Canyon, Desert, Moon) with their terrain, hazard, gravity, and color configurations, plus a helper to look up a stage by ID.
frontend/src/hillclimb/ui/AuthAndSyncPan: Provides Internet Identity login/logout and cloud save/load functionality, converting game state between frontend and backend formats and syncing via the actor.
React component rendering brake and gas pedal buttons with pointer event handling, pointer capture, and safety releases on unmount or visibility change.
frontend/src/hillclimb/ui/Hud.tsx: HUD component displaying coin count, fuel progress bar, and distance in meters overlaid on the game screen.
frontend/src/hillclimb/ui/Overlay.tsx: Simple wrapper component that renders children inside a centered Card overlay div.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Custom hook providing cross-browser fullscreen support with enter, exit, and toggle functions plus current fullscreen state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for room operations (check existence, create, get state) against the ICP backend actor, with stubs returning safe defaults for unimplemented endpoints.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind imports, CSS custom properties for the dark-themed design system, base resets, and a rotate-to-landscape overlay animation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/snake/Joystick.tsx: A touch/pointer-based virtual joystick component that tracks drag position, clamps thumb movement to a max radius, and emits filtered angle changes via a callback.
frontend/src/snake/joystickSteeringFilte: Provides a SteeringFilter class that processes raw joystick input with deadzone, angular hysteresis, and smoothing to produce stable directional angle output.
frontend/src/snake/logic.ts: Core game logic module defining arena constants, pickup configuration, and functions for creating and managing snake game state including world wrapping, snake initialization, and pickup generation.
frontend/src/snake/multiplayer/Multiplay: Displays a connecting/reconnecting/disconnected status card with retry and leave actions while establishing a multiplayer room connection.
Small overlay indicator that shows reconnecting or disconnected status; renders nothing when the connection is active.
Renders a leaderboard panel showing the top 3 players by score, highlighting the local player, using a styled HUD panel background.
Displays the current multiplayer room code with a copy-to-clipboard button that shows success/error feedback.
React context provider that manages multiplayer room state (create, join, leave) with status tracking and error handling, auto-joining from URL on mount.
Canvas component that renders the multiplayer snake game using requestAnimationFrame, drawing tiled background, grid, snakes, and pickups with a camera centered on the local player.
frontend/src/snake/multiplayer/types.ts: TypeScript interfaces for multiplayer game entities: MultiplayerSnake, MultiplayerGameState, and RoomInfo.
frontend/src/snake/multiplayer/urlRoomCo: Utility functions to read, write, clear, and build invite URLs for room codes stored in the URL query string.
frontend/src/snake/multiplayer/useInputS: Hook that periodically submits the player's current angle to the backend at 20Hz; the actual backend call is stubbed out as a placeholder.
frontend/src/snake/multiplayer/useMultip: Thin wrapper hook that re-exports the multiplayer room context via useMultiplayerRoomContext.
frontend/src/snake/multiplayer/useNickna: Hook that manages a player nickname with localStorage persistence and length validation.
frontend/src/snake/multiplayer/useRoomPo: Hook that polls room state from the backend at 100ms intervals using React Query, tracking connection status based on consecutive failures; backend call is currently stubbed.
frontend/src/snake/pickupSprites.ts: Maps pickup IDs to sprite sheet rectangles from a 4x4 food sprite grid and provides render size lookup by pickup type.
frontend/src/snake/RotateToLandscapeOver: A full-screen overlay component that displays a prompt with an animated phone icon asking the user to rotate their device to landscape mode.
frontend/src/snake/SnakeBoosters.tsx: Renders a row of three disabled booster buttons (magnet, boost, plus) with sprite-based icons and zero counts using WZ asset images.
frontend/src/snake/SnakeCanvas.tsx: A canvas-based renderer for the snake game that draws a tiled background, food pickups, coins, and snake segments using a camera-following, toroidal-wrapping world-to-screen projection.
frontend/src/snake/SnakeHUD.tsx: Renders the in-game HUD showing a top-3 leaderboard panel and an active mission panel with coin progress and a countdown timer circle.
frontend/src/snake/SnakeMainMenu.tsx: The main menu UI with solo play and multiplayer tabs, supporting nickname input, room creation, room joining with code validation, and invite link copying.
frontend/src/snake/SnakeMinimap.tsx: Renders a small canvas minimap showing player and AI snake head positions relative to the world, plus a viewport indicator rectangle.
frontend/src/snake/SnakeMissionCompleteO: A simple overlay panel that displays a mission-complete celebration message and indicates a new mission is starting.
frontend/src/snake/SnakeOverlays.tsx: Exports two overlay components: PauseOverlay with a resume button, and GameOverOverlay displaying final score and length with a play-again button.
frontend/src/snake/SnakeScreen.tsx: Main screen component for the snake game that composes the game canvas, HUD, overlays, joystick, minimap, and multiplayer UI elements. Handles keyboard/joystick input, pause/resume logic, fullscreen, landscape orientation, and multiplayer room state.
frontend/src/snake/SpaceSnakeCanvas.tsx: Canvas rendering component for the Space Snake game that draws the starfield background, grid, coins, colored points, and all snake entities (player and bots) with camera following the player.
frontend/src/snake/SpaceSnakeGameOverOve: Game over overlay for Space Snake displaying the final score, optional death reason, and buttons to play again or return to the main menu.
frontend/src/snake/SpaceSnakeJoystick.ts: Touch/pointer joystick component for Space Snake that tracks pointer events, clamps knob position within a circular base, and reports the current angle or null when released.
frontend/src/snake/SpaceSnakeLeaderboard: Leaderboard overlay component for Space Snake that displays a ranked list of player names and scores, highlighting the current player's entry.
frontend/src/snake/spaceSnakeLogic.ts: Core game logic for the Space Snake mode, including constants, entity types, and factory functions for creating player snakes, bots, coins, and color points.
frontend/src/snake/SpaceSnakeMainMenu.ts: Main menu screen for Space Snake featuring an animated starfield canvas background, a nickname input field, and a play button to start the game.
frontend/src/snake/SpaceSnakeMinimap.tsx: Circular minimap component for Space Snake that renders coins, colored points, bots, and the player's position/direction relative to the player's current location on a small canvas.
frontend/src/snake/SpaceSnakeMissionBann: Displays a HUD banner showing coin collection progress (collected/target) with a styled coin icon, centered at the top of the screen.
frontend/src/snake/SpaceSnakeScoreCounte: Renders a zero-padded 3-digit score counter fixed at the bottom center of the screen.
frontend/src/snake/SpaceSnakeScreen.tsx: Main screen component that orchestrates the snake game, composing the canvas, HUD overlays (leaderboard, mission banner, score, minimap), joystick, tilt controls, and landscape orientation handling.
A circular toggle button (mobile-only) that enables or disables gyroscope/tilt controls, showing active state visually with a rotated smartphone icon.
frontend/src/snake/types.ts: TypeScript interfaces for the arena snake game: Vector2, Snake, Pickup, MissionState, and SnakeGameState.
frontend/src/snake/useCanvasViewport.ts: Hook that measures a container element via ResizeObserver and returns responsive viewport dimensions with devicePixelRatio support, debounced via requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/snake/useLandscapeOrientati: React hook that tracks whether the device is in landscape orientation by comparing window width and height, updating on resize and orientationchange events.
frontend/src/snake/useSnakeGame.ts: Core game loop hook for the snake game managing player/AI movement, collision detection, mission timer, and input handling (joystick, keyboard, tilt) with turn-rate limiting.
frontend/src/snake/useSpaceSnakeGame.ts: Game state and loop hook for the Space Snake variant, managing player/bot snakes, coin/point spawning, collision detection, leaderboard, and multi-input steering (mouse, joystick, tilt).
frontend/src/snake/useTiltControls.ts: React hook that reads the DeviceOrientation gamma axis to produce a steering angle for tilt-based snake controls, including iOS 13+ permission handling and a deadzone filter.
frontend/src/snake/wzAssets.ts: Centralized export of asset path constants (background, menu, HUD, pickups) for the Worms Zone-style snake game.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with oklch-based semantic color tokens, custom border radii, and font families, plus the tailwindcss-animate plugin.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Snake Game 3D, its existing features, known issues (coin counter bug, minimap/joystick positioning), and fix requests for those issues.
